title: Phase 5B: Pickup module - service, API, queue page, pickup card, arrival check-in
description: Build the complete pickup module: pickup service with queue management, arrival check-in, prep timer, and handoff; API routes; pickup queue page; pickup card component; and customer arrival check-in flow.
steps: Create src/lib/services/pickup.service.ts with queue management, arrival check-in, prep timer tracking, handoff confirmation
Create src/app/api/pickups/route.ts with GET (queue) and POST (create ticket)
Create src/app/api/pickups/[id]/route.ts with GET, PUT (status update, check-in, handoff)
Create src/app/(dashboard)/pickup/page.tsx with pickup queue board
Display by status: NOT_READY, READY, CUSTOMER_ARRIVED, LOADING, COMPLETE
Create src/components/pickup/pickup-card.tsx with lane, bay, customer, prep timer, handoff button
Create src/components/pickup/arrival-checkin.tsx with customer arrival check-in flow
